Class JSONWriter

java.lang.Object
net.sf.jailer.xml.JSONWriter
All Implemented Interfaces:
XmlUtil.ObjectNotationWriter
public class JSONWriter extends Object implements XmlUtil.ObjectNotationWriter
A writer for JSON.
Author:
Ralf Wisser
